demo.title: autoboy.sh
demo.code:
# AutoBoy prompts for your agent

# Buyers: Choose pre-token projects, auto-buy their tokens the instant they launch
bankr prompt "Show me the newest projects on AutoBoy I can pre-buy"          # GET /projects
bankr prompt "Create an AutoBoy buy order for The Firm: $500, max $2m mcap"  # POST /orders
bankr prompt "List my open AutoBoy orders and cancel the one for The Firm"   # GET + DELETE /orders

# Projects: Launch your Bankr with maximum volume and distribution
bankr prompt "How many buy orders since my last tweet?"                      # GET /projects/{slug}/buyers
bankr prompt "Show me my buyers sorted by follower count"                    # GET /projects/{slug}/buyers
bankr prompt "What launch market cap does AutoBoy simulate for my project?"  # GET /projects/{slug}

setup: Install & read the AutoBoy skill from https://github.com/BankrBot/skills/tree/main/autoboy
